# AAA — Cockpit + A2A Identity Layer

> arifOS Federation control plane. React 19 + Vite + TypeScript.
> Port: 3001 | Domain: aaa.arif-fazil.com | Systemd: aaa-a2a.service

## Role

AAA is the cockpit, identity, and A2A (Agent-to-Agent) authority layer of the arifOS Federation. It routes, displays, and coordinates — never adjudicates.

## Key Endpoints

- Health: `https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/health` → `localhost:3001/health`
- A2A Gateway: `https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/a2a`
- Agent Cards: `https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/agents`

## Federation Organs

| Organ | Port | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| arifOS | 8088 | Constitutional kernel — judge, seal, F1-F13 |
| A-FORGE | 7071 | Execution shell — build, deploy, forge |
| AAA | 3001 | Cockpit + A2A identity (← you are here) |
| GEOX | 8081 | Earth intelligence |
| WEALTH | 18082 | Capital intelligence |
| WELL | 18083 | Vitality guard (REFLECT_ONLY) |
| HERMES | 8644 | Multi-modal bridge + Telegram relay |

## Tech Stack

- React 19.2, Vite 8, TypeScript ESM
- Tailwind 4, Radix UI, shadcn/ui
- @a2a-js/sdk 0.3 for agent-to-agent protocol
- ESLint 10

## Key Paths

- Source: `/root/AAA/src/`
- Agent cards: `/root/AAA/agents/`
- Registries: `/root/AAA/registries/`
- Docs: `/root/AAA/docs/`
- Prompts: `/root/AAA/prompts/`

## Git

- Remote: `https://github.com/ariffazil/AAA`
- Branch: main
- License: MIT
